Security Requirements Table

This document contains security requirements for cloud infrastructure.

Requirement ID Category Description Priority
SEC-001 Authentication All users must enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) High
SEC-002 Encryption Data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256 High
SEC-003 Access Control Role-based access control (RBAC) must be implemented Medium

Additional Notes

These requirements apply to all production systems.

Environment Compliance Level
Production Full
Staging Partial
